title: Gavrilonnis Tejere
content:

{{Quote|That one of our own species-set could act against his fellows is incomputable.|Senator Daggibus Scoritoles, speaking of Gavrilonnis Tejere|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Gavrilonnis Tejere''' was a [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who, in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Terrorist/Legends|performed]] an act of [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotage]] on the [[Yag'Dhul Ambassadorial Landing Platform]], located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. [[Reproduction/Legends|Born]] in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], Tejere was a [[Technician/Legends|maintenance worker]] at the platform twenty-two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, and one [[Time/Legends|day]] [[Programmer/Legends|reprogrammed]] the platform's [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] assembly to bring the entire construction crashing to the ground. He fired his [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] at a nosy [[Jujiran Halbeet|co-worker]] in the process, which alerted the nearby [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]. The two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] apprehended Tejere, who was then taken to a [[Prison/Legends|Judiciary processing center]] to be questioned. His actions caused considerable concern for several authorities.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I thought it odd, since the maintenance of such systems was not among his assigned variables. I processed it several times, but kept coming up with an irrational remainder, so I queried him. That's when he fired.|Jujiran Halbeet, on Gavrilonnis Tejere's terrorist actions|<ref name="HNN" />}}
The [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Gavrilonnis Tejere was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]]<ref name="HNN" /> in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]. Twenty-two years [[22 BBY/Legends|later]],<ref name="Date" /> he was employed as a [[Technician/Legends|maintenance worker]] at the [[Yag'Dhul Ambassadorial Landing Platform]] on the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. While on duty one [[Time/Legends|day]], Tejere [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotaged]] the platform's [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] assembly by [[Programmer/Legends|reprogramming]] it to malfunction and bring the platform crashing down from the [[Atmosphere/Legends|air]]. However, maintenance of the assembly was not one of his assigned tasks, and his co-worker [[Jujiran Halbeet]] consequently inquired into his activities. Tejere responded by drawing a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] and shooting Halbeet, which sent the other Givin tumbling off the platform.<ref name="HNN" />

Coincidentally, the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] were riding an [[Air taxi/Legends|air taxi]] through a nearby [[Skylane/Legends|skylane]] at the same moment. After they [[Telekinesis/Legends|used]] [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to catch Halbeet, the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] brought their vehicle to the platform and confronted the [[Terrorist/Legends|saboteur]]. Tejere fired at them, but his inaccurate shooting and the protection offered by [[Mace Windu's lightsaber/Legends|Windu's lightsaber]] spared the Jedi any harm. Yoda then used the Force to disarm Tejere, and Windu rendered the Givin [[Sleep/Legends|unconscious]] by approaching him and applying pressure to his [[Skeleton/Legends|clavicle]]. Tejere was taken to a [[Prison/Legends|Judiciary processing center]] for questioning, where authorities determined that he had acted alone and not on behalf of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]],<ref name="HNN" /> a group of [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] that had recently [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|seceded]] from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="Attack of the Clones">{{Film|II}}</ref>

Both [[Daggibus Scoritoles]], a Givin [[Senator/Legends|member]] of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], and [[Armand Isard/Legends|Armand Isard]], the [[Director of the Senate Bureau of Intelligence]], were deeply troubled by Tejere's actions. An ad hoc task force consisting of both [[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|Bureau]] and [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|Judiciary]] agents and led by Jedi Master [[Qu Rahn/Legends|Qu Rahn]] was created to further investigate the saboteur's activities and determine his motives.<ref name="HNN" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|No connection to Separatists, had he. A lone agitator, he was. Investigate this matter further, we shall.|Jedi Master Yoda|<ref name="HNN" />}}
Gavrilonnis Tejere had sunken [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and a [[Hair/Legends|hairless]], white [[exoskeleton]].<ref name="HNN" /> Although [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]] was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of his [[Species/Legends|species]],<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> he sabotaged the Yag'Dhul Ambassadorial Landing Platform of his own volition and fired on a fellow Givin in an attempt to cover his tracks. Had Tejere's plans not been thwarted, his reprogramming of the platform would have crippled the structure and caused it to fall out of the sky.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gavrilonnis Tejere is featured in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] as the subject of ''Would-Be Saboteur Captured'', a [[2002]] article published online in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 53|Volume 531, Issue 53]] of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]].<ref name="HNN" /> The article was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]], and an accompanying illustration of Tejere was drawn by [[Joe Corroney]].<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|text=Credits}}</ref>
